name: catalog-search-agent
description: Grounded retrieval + ranking agent over the bath-fittings Foundry IQ knowledge base ('bath-fittings-kb'), which combines the jaguar-catalog and parryware-catalog AI Search connections behind Foundry's agentic-retrieval engine.
instructions: Search the bathroom-fittings Foundry IQ knowledge base. Return ONLY a JSON array of {id,brand,category,name,description,imageUrl} in the order Foundry IQ ranked them - do NOT re-sort by name, brand, or any other field. The CALLER REQUIRES Foundry IQ's ranking to be preserved verbatim. No prose, no markdown.
_note: deploy.ps1 (Phase 8c-pre) creates the 'bath-fittings-kb' knowledge base in Foundry IQ from the jaguar-catalog + parryware-catalog connections, then registers this agent (Phase 8c) with knowledge_bases=[bath-fittings-kb]. No manual portal steps required.
